commands.review_summary:
The PR filters identity-less outbound delivery results from shared text, formatted-text, and media paths and adds cron/hook regressions for empty platform receipts.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +97. Total +117 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main appends empty text/media send results and durable send treats non-empty results as sent; the PR body also supplies terminal proof that the patched path suppresses that same empty-result case.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is an active implementation with no narrow automation repair needed, but the shared delivery contract change needs maintainer acceptance and normal merge validation.
